name: Pressure Cooker Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash cucumbers and do not cut off the ends.
2. Place in a crock and pour boiling water over them, allowing to cool.
3. Pour off the water, then cut off the ends and slice or quarter the cucumbers.
4. Place cucumbers in jars and mix syrup.
5. To make the syrup: Combine 5 cups white vinegar, 5 cups sugar, 2 tablespoons salt, and 2 tablespoons mixed spices (or substitute 6 whole cloves and 1 cinnamon stick per jar).
6. Pour hot syrup over the cucumbers and seal the jars.
7. Place in a pressure cooker and bring up to 5 pounds of pressure, then turn off.
8. Ensure the cooker is just at the point of spitting steam, without allowing it to fully steam out.
This recipe should yield approximately 7 quarts of pickled cucumbers.
